tkinter_app_database module

class tkinter_app_database.SchoolApp(root)[source]

Bases: object

A Tkinter-based School Management System. This class builds a tkinter based GUI for managing students, instructors, and courses by allowing users use it by adding, editing, deleting, registering, assigning, searching, exporting to CSV, and backing up the database.. It relies on database.py module for storage and general databasae operations.

Parameters:

root (tk.Tk) – Root Tkinter window for attaching the application.

add_course()[source]

Create a new course using the ID and name that the user adds. The instructor is npt set until later on. After adding, the table and dropdowns are refreshed. :raises ValueError: If course ID or name is empty. :return: None :rtype: None

add_instructor()[source]

Add a new instructor to the database. Reads ID, name, age, and email from the entry fields, checks that all are valid, and stores the record.

Raises:

ValueError – If required fields are missing or age is not numeric.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

add_student()[source]

Add a new student to the database and validates that all required fields are filled and that age is numeric value. when it works and succeeds, it updates where it inserts its new record.

Raises:

ValueError – If any field is missing or age is not numeric.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

assign_instructor()[source]

Assign the selected instructor to the selected course.

If the course has no name, asks the user to provide one :param iid: Instructor ID. :type iid: str :param cid: Course ID. :type cid: str :raises ValueError: If course name is missing when required. :return: None :rtype: None

backup_db()[source]

Backups the database. Triggers the backup operation in the database module and shows the result.

Returns:

Backup status message.

Return type:

str

delete_record()[source]

Delete the selected record. Determines if the selected row is a student or instructor, or course, and removes it.

Raises:

LookupError – If no record is selected.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

edit_record()[source]

Edit a selected record. Opens a popup window with editable fields and then also saves the record back after validation.

Raises:

  • LookupError – If no record is selected.

  • ValueError – If inputs are invalid (for example non-numeric age).

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

export_csv()[source]

Export records to a CSV file. it writes students, instructors, and courses to school_data.csv.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

refresh_dropdowns()[source]

refresh all dropdown menus. it updates student, instructor, and course boxes from database.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

register_student()[source]

Register the selected student to the selected course. Uses the selected values from the student and course dropdowns.

Parameters:

  • sid (str) – Student ID to register.

  • cid (str) – Course ID selected in the combobox.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

search_records()[source]

Search for records by ID or name. Reads the search box text and updates the table accordingly.

Parameters:

q (str) – Search string typed by the user.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None

update_tree(q='')[source]

Refresh the main table view, it clears and reloads students and instructors and courses. If a query string is provided, filters by ID or name.

Parameters:

q (str, optional) – Optional search string, defaults to “”.

Returns:

None

Return type:

None
